analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet informs that EU citizens living in the UK must apply for settled status and invites senior EU citizens to a Facebook Q&A with an immigration lawyer. It is informational about post-Brexit residency procedures, offering assistance. Evaluation of narratives: EU1 (EU as a successful story): Not promoted; no praise of EU history or achievements. EU2 (EU is united): Not addressed; no mention of EU unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens): Not promoted; the help offered is from an immigration lawyer/organization, not from EU policies or actions improving lives within the EU. The context is about EU citizens in the UK (a non-EU country post-Brexit), and no EU measure is highlighted. EU4 (EU avant-garde): Not relevant. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes): Not claimed. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any of the listed EU narratives.
